title: That thing on the Moon in 2XX
display_title: That thing on the Moon in 2XX
wikitext:
[]: That thing on the Moon in 2.XX [spoilers]             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Wed May 26, 2010 10:53 pm One thing I noticed while watching Eva 2.22 is that when Gendo goes to the moon to look at Seele's Mark 06 project, there is a being beside the Eva unit that looks like a black Lilith. Could this be a different Seed? Could it be Adam? Or did Seele somehow transport the Lilith on the cross all the way to the moon?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 26, 2010 11:29 pm It's just Eva-06 in the process of being armored up. Though what looked like exposed black skin around the head region did make "Lilith antithesis" come to mind.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Thu May 27, 2010 12:51 am You didn't watch the first movie?
